{{Quote|Girlfriend? It's getting so you can't tell one sex from the other in these spaceport towns.|Han Solo|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 8">[[Star Wars (1977) 8|''Star Wars'' (1977) 8]]</ref>}}
'''Pig-face''' was the nickname [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] gave to a sapient, brown-furred, bipedal primate he accidentally bumped into during a brawl with [[Warto]] at [[Locru's Central Saloon]]. Insulting the [[Alien/Legends|alien's]] [[Unidentified individual ("Pig-face")|romantic partner]] with the nickname, Han earned their ire, leading to the other individual taking a swing at Han, although they missed.
